starry_unigraph.backends.ctdg.model module

class starry_unigraph.backends.ctdg.model.CTDGLinkPredictor(num_nodes: int, hidden_dim: int, edge_feat_dim: int, dim_time: int = 100, num_head: int = 2, dropout: float = 0.1, att_dropout: float = 0.1)[source]

Bases: Module

forward(src_conv: Tensor, dst_conv: Tensor, neg_conv: Tensor) → CTDGModelOutput[source]

Defines the computation performed at every call.

Should be overridden by all subclasses.

Note

Although the recipe for forward pass needs to be defined within this function, one should call the Module instance afterwards instead of this since the former takes care of running the registered hooks while the latter silently ignores them.

class starry_unigraph.backends.ctdg.model.CTDGMemoryUpdater(hidden_dim: int, mailbox_slot_dim: int, mailbox_slots: int)[source]

Bases: Module

Updates per-node memory from K-slot mailbox history.

forward(mailbox_history: Tensor, current_memory: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Defines the computation performed at every call.

Should be overridden by all subclasses.

Note

Although the recipe for forward pass needs to be defined within this function, one should call the Module instance afterwards instead of this since the former takes care of running the registered hooks while the latter silently ignores them.

class starry_unigraph.backends.ctdg.model.CTDGModelOutput(pos_logits: 'torch.Tensor', neg_logits: 'torch.Tensor')[source]

Bases: object

neg_logits: Tensor
pos_logits: Tensor
class starry_unigraph.backends.ctdg.model.TemporalTransformerConv(dim_node: int, dim_edge: int, dim_time: int, num_head: int, dim_out: int, dropout: float = 0.1, att_dropout: float = 0.1)[source]

Bases: Module

Single-layer temporal transformer attention over a DGL bipartite block.

Expects block.srcdata[‘h’], block.edata[‘dt’], block.edata[‘f’]. The first num_dst rows of srcdata[‘h’] correspond to dst nodes (same convention as MemShare).

forward(b: DGLGraph) → Tensor[source]
b: DGL block

srcdata[‘h’] [n_dst + n_src, D] – dst nodes first, then neighbors edata[‘dt’] [E] – time delta (scalar per edge) edata[‘f’] [E, dim_edge] – edge features

Returns: [n_dst, dim_out]

class starry_unigraph.backends.ctdg.model.TimeEncode(dim: int)[source]

Bases: Module

forward(t: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Defines the computation performed at every call.

Should be overridden by all subclasses.

Note

Although the recipe for forward pass needs to be defined within this function, one should call the Module instance afterwards instead of this since the former takes care of running the registered hooks while the latter silently ignores them.

starry_unigraph.backends.ctdg.model.build_dgl_block(bts_block: object, roots: Tensor, edge_feat_all: Tensor, device: device | str) → DGLGraph | None[source]

Convert one BTS TemporalGraphBlock into a DGL bipartite block.

Stores global node IDs in srcdata[‘__ID’] (MemShare convention). Caller fills srcdata[‘h’] via memory[b.srcdata[‘__ID’]] after this call. Returns None if no edges were sampled.
